mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task (title, content, user_id, status, receiver_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{receiverId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, user_id, status, receiver_id, create_time, update_time FROM task ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, title, content, user_id, status, receiver_id, create_time, update_time FROM task WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, title, content, user_id, status, receiver_id, create_time, update_time FROM task WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE task SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, user_id = #{userId}, status = #{status}, receiver_id = #{receiverId}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE task SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE task SET receiver_id = #{receiverId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
